items.name: smart-approve
items.title: Smart Approve
items.description: A PreToolUse hook that decomposes compound Bash commands (&&, ||, ;, |, $(), backticks) into their component sub-commands and checks each one independently against a deny list, closing the chain-smuggling gap where a dangerous operation is embedded inside a safe-looking command chain. Use to upgrade command-guard with compound-command awareness.
items.author: Khaled Saeed
